name: Shivom
specialties: Architecting enterprise-ready Cloud applications on AWS
Data Analytics with Python and SQL
Building GenAI applications using LLMs (Ollama, Bedrock), core LLM engineering and LLM frameworks (Langchain, LangGraph, CrewAI)
Tinkering, experimenting and learning new technologies
NLP, OCR, Computer Vision and building SLM pipelines from scratch using Transformers and Deep Learning

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science
education.institution: Dr D. Y. Patil School of Engineering, Pune (affiliated to Savitribai Phule Pune University)

hobbies: I love listening to music but I can't stand heavy hip hop and metal.
Cooking and trying out new recipes (I have amazing beginners cooking skills with most recipes!)
Watching movies and series (I am a big fan of thrillers and psychological genres, quirky romantic comedies, and sci-fi)
Trying out new activities and learning new skills (I am always up for a new challenge or adventure!)
Writing code on personal projects (I love building cool stuff and sharing it with the world!)

Gardening and taking care of my plants (I have a small outdoor garden in my frontyard that I am very proud of! I'm currently growing cherry tomatoes, lettuce, broccoli, spinach, chillis, herbs, lemons, guavas and papayas!)
Home improvement and DIY projects (I enjoy fixing things around the house and making it more comfortable and functional!)
